title: Chat rate limiter too aggressive — user can't send commands fast enough
description:
Chat rate limiter is too aggressive — the user can't send commands quickly enough. From chat: "[DEBUG] Ratelimit too high"

The agent response was: "I'm receiving messages too quickly — please give me a moment between commands."

The global per-minute max (20) and player cooldown (3s) may be reasonable defaults, but the implementation might be too strict or the cooldown might be applied incorrectly. Investigate the ChatRateLimiter behavior.
